concerns.text: SC-003 requires statistical power ≥0.8 measurement, but no task exists to implement power analysis or verify this threshold in the statistical pipeline (T021-T028 cover MWU, Cliff's delta, correction, but not power analysis)

FR-011 requires pilot study validation (n≥50, r≥0.5) OR peer-reviewed citation for proxy correlation, but T027 only creates a 'pilot study validation stub' which does not deliver the actual validation workflow or citation mechanism

FR-008 requires 'community-standard justification' documentation for thresholds, but no task explicitly implements this justification documentation (T026 only covers sensitivity analysis across thresholds, not the justification text)

Constitution V requires artifact hashes and updated_at timestamps in state YAML files, but no task exists to implement state file hash tracking and timestamp updates (T001 creates structure but not the tracking logic)

Independence assumption violation (CodeSearchNet snippets may share authors/repositories) is documented in plan but no task addresses subsampling to one snippet per repository OR implementing cluster-robust standard errors to mitigate this statistical validity issue

T013 references '(Plan.md Constitutional Check)' as a tag, but this is not a formal FR/SC identifier. The plan.md Constitutional Check section shows VI and VII are BLOCKING, creating a logical contradiction where verification cannot succeed without a verified source
